text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
While having lunch in the cafeteria, I<n>catch Agnes
Digital snooping around<n>the place.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Is that enough for you, Suzuka? I can<n>get you
some more if you want!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
No, this is enough. Um... how's your
weight-watching going, Spe?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Quit copying me! I picked thatdessert first!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yeah, well, you took the side dish thatI wanted! It was me who—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Inspirations... Rivals... Guehehe, just<n>look at them
all eating lunch together!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Aaasfhjsksd, they're too blinding!<n>But I've gotta
burn this into my<n>retinas! Lights... action... stare
respectfully!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...Fascinating how visual excitement<n>can invoke
such heavy breathing!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Uwahskgl?! T-Tachyon! As<n>indubitably intelligent
as ever today, I<n>see!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
An interesting greeting considering<n>we're
roommates and saw each<n>other this morning, but
no matter.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
More importantly, there's something<n>that's been
on my mind for the<n>longest time. Care to indulge
me?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Sure, I'll tell you anything and<n>everything!
W-well, I mean,<n>depending what you're okay
hearing...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I was curious about the shrine you<n>have in our
room, you see. What<n>exactly are you
worshipping?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wha? M-my merch shrine? That's,<n>uh...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
May my precious Umas have a<n>wonderful day
and week and month<n>and be happy forever and
ever and<n>ever!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Asdfkl, I'm so blessed! My figures<n>look extra
ultra radiant today!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Umamusume figures... I see. You<n>certainly could
liken figures to idols.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
See, whenever I pray to them, I feel<n>like I can
take on any track there is!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Like... my Uma oshis are working so<n>hard, I feel
like I can do my best too.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It gets my blood pumping and my<n>heart pounding.
I feel all-powered up!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh? That's very intriguing!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like more than just an<n>adrenaline rush.
Perhaps your heart<n>palpitations have an effect on
your<n>blood circulation... Hmm.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Say, Digital. How would you feel<n>about working
with me as my test<n>subject?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hwargh?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hahahaha! An excellent response!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Now let's see... I'll first require a<n>small sample in
order to analyze you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Give me your hand. Now relaaax,<n>you'll barely
feel a prick!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
N-no! I can't touch an Umamusume!<n>That's
against fangirl code!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: A-ahem! No touching, no requests,and absolutely no getting in theway! But... But... AAAAAAAAAA!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Digital, please compose yourself. I<n>need a control
sample of your vitals in<n>a relaxed sta—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Just, just imagining touching theAgnes Tachyon... I can't. Digitan'spoor little heart can't hold all thesefeels!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Aaaaah, I'm gonna cry tears of joy!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Wonderful! Such explosive force!<n>Maybe she
has experienced some<n>kind of mutation after all!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Mwahaha... This is getting veryinteresting!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Stop right there, Digital!
